meta.title: The Art of the Possible — Azure Network Architecture Diagrams
meta.description: Layered, reusable, GitHub-friendly network architecture diagrams for Cloud Solutions Architects

diagrams.title: Hub and Spoke
diagrams.description: Classic hub-and-spoke topology with shared services hub, spoke VNets, and VNet peering. Covers routing, firewall integration, and spoke isolation patterns.

diagrams.title: Azure Virtual WAN
diagrams.description: Azure Virtual WAN architectures including secured hubs, branch connectivity, and any-to-any routing patterns.

diagrams.title: DNS in Azure
diagrams.description: Comprehensive DNS architecture patterns in Azure — Private DNS Zones, Azure DNS Private Resolver, conditional forwarding, and hybrid DNS flows.

diagrams.title: Private Endpoints
diagrams.description: Private Endpoint patterns for PaaS services — DNS integration, spoke connectivity, hub-and-spoke flows, and on-premises resolution.

diagrams.title: Load Balancing
diagrams.description: Azure load balancing decision tree and architecture patterns — Azure Load Balancer, Application Gateway, Azure Front Door, and Traffic Manager.

diagrams.title: NVA High Availability
diagrams.description: Network Virtual Appliance (NVA) high availability patterns — active-active, active-passive, Route Server integration, and ECMP routing.

diagrams.title: AKS Networking
diagrams.description: Azure Kubernetes Service networking deep-dive — CNI options (Azure CNI, Kubenet, Cilium), ingress patterns, egress control, and private cluster connectivity.

diagrams.title: Azure AI Architectures
diagrams.description: Network architecture patterns for Azure AI services — Azure OpenAI, private networking, API Management integration, and secure AI landing zones.

diagrams.title: Data Architectures
diagrams.description: Network patterns for Azure data services — Synapse Analytics, Azure Data Factory, storage accounts, and analytics platform connectivity.

diagrams.title: Azure VMware Solution
diagrams.description: Full Azure VMware Solution architecture — network topology, ExpressRoute connectivity, NSX-T segments, HCX migration, and internet egress patterns.

diagrams.title: AVS Bootcamp
diagrams.description: Condensed AVS architecture diagrams designed for bootcamp and workshop delivery — step-by-step layered views for learning.

diagrams.title: Demo
diagrams.description: Sample/demo diagram for testing and illustration purposes.
